loadError: Something went wrong while loading data.

detail.title: Quotation details
detail.subtitle: View quotation information, approval flow, and reports

create.title: Create quotation
create.submit: Save quotation and send for approval
create.successMessage: The quotation has been sent for approval.
create.errorMessage: Something went wrong while creating the quotation.
create.subtitle: Manage the header, lines, and exchange rates
create.pageDescription: Fill in the header, add lines, check the summary, then save.
create.helpStep1: Search the customer field or use the address-book icon; pick document serial type first if required.
create.helpStep2: Adjust offer date, delivery, and exchange rates as needed.
create.helpStep3: Add line items; use Preview to check the PDF.
create.helpStep4: Review totals in the summary on the right, then click Save.

header.title: Quotation details
header.descriptionErpTooltip: General production note for the whole quotation. When sent to ERP, it is saved to the Netsis header Description field (FatUst.Aciklama).

currencyChange.title: Change currency
currencyChange.message: If you change the currency, all lines will be recalculated. Do you want to continue?

lines.title: Quotation lines
lines.emptyDescription: Use “Select stock” or “Add line” to add rows to the quotation
lines.discountLimitExceeded: Discount rates exceed your permitted limits.
lines.descriptionTooltipText: Line-level production notes. When transferred to ERP, Netsis mapping is: Description 1 -> Extra Field 1, Description 2 -> Extra Field 2, Description 3 -> Line Extra Description 7.
lines.profileErpTooltip: This Profile selection is saved to the Netsis Line Extra Description 2 field when sent to ERP.
lines.rebarErpTooltip: This Rebar selection is sent to ERP as the Netsis Line Extra Description 3 value.
lines.screwErpTooltip: This Screw selection is sent to ERP as the Netsis Line Extra Description 4 value.
lines.printErpTooltip: This Print selection is sent to ERP as the Netsis Line Extra Description 8 value. The print note is also sent to Netsis line Description 9 and Line Extra Description 9.

exchangeRates.title: Exchange rates
exchangeRates.updateError: Exchange rates could not be updated.
exchangeRates.cannotEditUsedCurrency: You cannot change the rate for a currency that is already in use.
exchangeRates.zeroRateError: Enter an exchange rate to continue.

dialog.title: Exchange rates
dialog.description: View rates and edit them if needed. Edited rates will not be marked as official.
dialog.subtitle: Check the rates used on this quotation

approval.startError: Approval process could not be started.
approval.rejectDescription: Enter a reason for rejecting this quotation.
approval.lockedForNonApprover: This record is in the approval process. Only the active approver can make changes. The form is read-only for you.
approval.approvedReadOnlyReason: This quotation has been approved. Approved quotations cannot be edited or revised directly. All fields are read-only.
approval.rejectedReadOnlyReason: This quotation was rejected. Use "Revise" from the quotation list to make changes.
approval.closedReason: This record was closed because another record with the same offer number was approved. All fields are read-only.

notes.title: Quotation notes
notes.description: Add and edit internal notes for this quotation.
notes.notesTooltipText: Shipment/invoice notes for the whole quotation. They are saved sequentially to Netsis quotation/order header Extra Description 1-5; note 2 is sent to Netsis Extra Description 2.
notes.linesHint: Each line appears separately in PDF and document notes.
notes.maxLengthError: Each note can be at most 1,000 characters.
notes.maxCountError: You can add at most 10 notes.

summary.title: Summary
summary.generalDiscountHelp: Lump-sum discount applied to the quotation total after line totals.

share.whatsappMessage: Sharing the quotation details with you.
share.nativeWhatsappFallback: PDF downloaded. WhatsApp opened — attach the file to the chat.
share.nativeMailFallback: PDF downloaded. Compose opened for {{email}} — attach the downloaded PDF.
share.nativeMailSentApi: Quotation sent with PDF attachment to {{email}}.
share.nativeEmailRequired: No saved email found for this customer or contact.

nativePrep.description: You can edit the message. The app may not include it — copy and paste if needed.
nativePrep.mailDescription: Recipient comes from the customer record. Choose your mail app; To and subject are pre-filled. Attach the downloaded PDF.
nativePrep.mailDescriptionApi: Your Outlook or Gmail integration is connected. The quotation will be sent with PDF attached.
nativePrep.subject: Subject
nativePrep.hint: Tap Share to pick an app. If the message is missing, paste it manually.
nativePrep.mailHint: Open email downloads the PDF and opens a draft in your selected mail app. Attach the PDF.
nativePrep.mailHintApi: Send delivers the mail with attachment via CRM; no separate window opens.

shareWhatsappDialog.title: Send Quotation via WhatsApp
shareWhatsappDialog.description: The quotation PDF is sent to the customer's saved phone number automatically.
shareWhatsappDialog.phoneRequired: No saved phone number was found for this customer or contact.
shareWhatsappDialog.phoneAutoHint: Number was filled automatically from customer/contact records. You can edit it if needed.
shareWhatsappDialog.phoneMissing: No phone number is saved for this customer. Add one on the customer card or enter it below.
shareWhatsappDialog.notConfigured: WhatsApp integration is not active. Configure it under Settings > WhatsApp.

shareMailDialog.title: Send Quotation by Email
shareMailDialog.description: Send the quotation PDF as an attachment using your connected email account.
shareMailDialog.notConnected: No Gmail or Outlook connection found. Connect an account in integration settings.

exportPreview.title: Preview & share
exportPreview.subtitle: Review the PDF, then download it or share via WhatsApp and email.
exportPreview.error: Could not create the PDF. Please try again.

pdfExportTemplate.validityNote: This quotation is valid for 15 days from the date of issue.

update.errorMessage: Something went wrong while updating the quotation.

waitingApprovals.title: Quotations awaiting approval
waitingApprovals.description: Quotations that are waiting for approval.

step1.title: Step 1: Quotation details
step1.description: Enter the header and exchange rates

exchangeRate.required: Add at least one rate for currencies other than TRY

try.info: No exchange rate is required when TRY is selected

validation.invalidLines: Every line must be complete and valid

approval.info: After save, the quotation is sent for approval automatically
